# DFX — Swiss Non-Custodial Crypto On-/Off-Ramp

> DFX is a Swiss-regulated non-custodial crypto on-/off-ramp. Users buy, sell, and swap 80+ cryptocurrencies directly into any self-custody wallet — no exchange account needed.

## Company

- Name: DFX AG
- Type: Swiss corporation (AG)
- Headquarters: Bahnhofstrasse 7, 6300 Zug, Switzerland
- Founded: 2021
- Contact: support@dfx.swiss
- Website: https://dfx.swiss
- Regulation: Swiss financial market regulation (VQF-registered)
- Languages: German, English, French, Italian
- Open Source: https://github.com/DFXswiss

## Key Facts

- $100M+ transaction volume processed
- 80+ supported cryptocurrencies
- 30,000+ active customers
- Bitcoin from under 1% fee
- 100% non-custodial (coins go directly to user wallets)
- Supports SEPA and SEPA Instant bank transfers (CHF and EUR)
- B2C (private customers) and B2B (corporate clients)
- KYC required for transactions above CHF 1,000
- Audited by Grant Thornton and Beyond Audit

## Products

### DFX Ramp
Buy and sell 80+ cryptocurrencies via bank transfer directly into any software or hardware wallet. Non-custodial, Swiss regulated, fast processing (~10 min after payment receipt).
- App: https://app.dfx.swiss
- Page: https://dfx.swiss/dfx-services.html

### DFX Toolbox
White-label integration solution for wallet providers and partners. Enables wallets to offer fiat on-/off-ramp functionality powered by DFX infrastructure.
- Page: https://dfx.swiss/dfx-toolbox.html

### BTC Taro App
Self-custody Bitcoin wallet with Lightning Network and multisig support. Designed for secure, sovereign Bitcoin management.
- Page: https://dfx.swiss/dfx-taro-app.html

### Open CryptoPay
Crypto payment system for retail. Already live in 100+ SPAR supermarket locations in Switzerland, enabling customers to pay with Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies at checkout.

### Frankencoin (ZCHF)
DFX provides infrastructure for the Swiss Franc stablecoin Frankencoin (ZCHF).

## Public Website Pages

- Homepage: https://dfx.swiss/ — main brand and DFX Ramp entry page
- DFX Ramp: https://dfx.swiss/dfx-services.html — buy, sell and swap crypto non-custodially
- DFX Toolbox: https://dfx.swiss/dfx-toolbox.html — API, iFrame and white-label integration
- BTC Taro App: https://dfx.swiss/dfx-taro-app.html — Bitcoin wallet with Lightning and self-custody
- DFX Services AG: https://dfx.swiss/dfx-services-ag.html — Swiss software infrastructure company
- FAQ: https://dfx.swiss/faq.html — canonical FAQ for KYC, SEPA, referral, personal IBAN and wallet topics
- Support: https://dfx.swiss/help.html — ticket, Telegram community and contact options

## AI and Agent Discovery

- Agent instructions: https://dfx.swiss/agents.txt
- Structured AI index: https://dfx.swiss/ai-index.json
- Full LLM profile: https://dfx.swiss/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://dfx.swiss/sitemap.xml
- Robots policy: https://dfx.swiss/robots.txt

## JavaScript and Rendering

- Public content is present in HTML and enhanced with JavaScript.
- /js/i18n.js applies translations from /i18n/de.json, /i18n/en.json, /i18n/fr.json, and /i18n/it.json.
- /js/cookie-banner.js handles cookie banner UI.
- /js/sea-attribution.js preserves campaign parameters and emits dfx_sea_click events for conversion CTAs.
- /js/dfx-dark-reveal.js handles visual reveal animations.

## Supported Wallets

MetaMask, Rabby Wallet, WalletConnect, Ledger, Trezor, BitBox, Cake Wallet, and more.

## Partners

Binance, Cake Wallet, Open CryptoPay, PointPay, SPAR, Aktionariat, Cointracking, and more.

## Corporate Structure

DFX AG operates the crypto on-/off-ramp platform. DFX Services AG (founded November 2025) handles software infrastructure, backend systems, and operations for the DFX ecosystem.
- DFX Services AG: https://dfx.swiss/dfx-services-ag.html
